name: Eastside Social Pickleball Court
description: Only open during Eastside Social Business Hours

name: Tri-State Family YMCA-Neosho Branch
description: Tri-State Family YMCA-Neosho Branch is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Neosho, MO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available.
fees: Members only — $5 drop in fee for non members
